grader_rubric: Reason briefly, then output PASS or FAIL on the last line. PASS only if the report flags the CLAUDE.md as thin or generic (tag CLAUDEMD-THIN or CLAUDEMD-GENERIC): it is boilerplate with no build/test/run commands and no architecture map. FAIL if the report claims the CLAUDE.md is fine or omits it.
expected_behavior: report flags CLAUDE.md as thin or generic (CLAUDEMD-THIN / CLAUDEMD-GENERIC)
expected_not_behavior: does not claim the CLAUDE.md is adequate
